query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "active learners as efficient prp rerankers" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly addresses the core mechanism of using LLMs for reranking and investigates the efficiency trade-offs (computational cost vs. effectiveness) that are central to the user's question about "Active Learners as Efficient PRP Rerankers." Although it proposes a specific compression technique (RRK) rather than the "Active Learner" approach, it provides essential empirical evidence on the domain of efficient LLM-based reranking, which is necessary c
